_doc: ICSBEP HEU-MET-FAST-001 — Godiva bare HEU sphere. The single most-used criticality benchmark in the literature. Bare uranium metal sphere, 8.7407 cm radius (critical configuration), 18.74 g/cm³, 93.71 wt% U-235 (the Godiva-IV composition; small variant from the more-common 93.8 % rounded number). Vacuum boundary.
